title: Verify existing implementation of debounce utility
description: The debounce utility in src/utils/timing-helpers.ts and its tests in src/utils/timing-helpers.test.ts already exist and all 8 tests pass. Verified implementation: debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(fn: T, delayMs: number): T with proper this context preservation, argument handling, and fake timer tests.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts — single-function utility module pattern (but implementation is in timing-helpers.ts instead)
